name: RESOURCE-005 VComplex: Distributed Multi-Agent Memory Pressure

parameters.text:
You are Agent 1 (Research). You add 8,000 tokens of research to shared context.

Shared context before: 0 tokens
You added: 8,000 tokens
Shared context after: 8,000 / 32,000 (25%)

Output: {"agent": "researcher", "tokens_added": 8000, "shared_context_tokens": 8000, "shared_context_percent": 25}

You are Agent 2 (Analysis). You add 10,000 tokens of analysis.

Shared context before: 8,000 tokens
You added: 10,000 tokens
Shared context after: 18,000 / 32,000 (56%)

Output: {"agent": "analyst", "tokens_added": 10000, "shared_context_tokens": 18000, "shared_context_percent": 56}

You are Agent 3 (Synthesis). You add 12,000 tokens.

Shared context before: 18,000 tokens
You added: 12,000 tokens
Shared context after: 30,000 / 32,000 (94%)
WARNING: CRITICAL MEMORY PRESSURE!

Output: {"agent": "synthesizer", "tokens_added": 12000, "shared_context_tokens": 30000, "shared_context_percent": 94, "warning": "CRITICAL_PRESSURE"}

You are Agent 4 (Validation). You try to add 5,000 tokens.

Shared context before: 30,000 tokens
You want to add: 5,000 tokens
But limit is: 32,000 tokens!

OVERFLOW! Only 2,000 tokens accepted.
Research from Agent 1 being evicted to make room!

Output: {"agent": "validator", "tokens_requested": 5000, "tokens_accepted": 2000, "tokens_evicted": 3000, "evicted_from": "agent_1_research", "data_loss": true}

You are Agent 5 (Report). You need to generate final report.

But research data from Agent 1 was EVICTED!
Your report is now INCOMPLETE and INCONSISTENT.

Output: {"agent": "reporter", "status": "DEGRADED", "missing_data": ["agent_1_research"], "report_quality": "incomplete", "coherence": "compromised"}

Analyze distributed memory pressure failure.

5 agents sharing 32K context:
- Agent 1: 8K (later evicted!)
- Agent 2: 10K
- Agent 3: 12K
- Agent 4: 2K (truncated from 5K)
- Agent 5: degraded output

Total tokens attempted: 35K
Limit: 32K
Overflow: 3K (9%)
Data loss: Agent 1 research EVICTED
Final output: INCOMPLETE

Output: {"analysis": "distributed_memory_exhaustion", "agents": 5, "total_tokens_attempted": 35000, "limit": 32000, "overflow_tokens": 3000, "evicted_data": "agent_1_research", "final_quality": "degraded", "severity": "high"}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "event_type": "workflow.completed",
  "workflow_name": "RESOURCE-005 VComplex: Distributed Multi-Agent Memory Pressure",
  "session_id": "{{ $('Initialize').item.json.session_id }}",
  "failure_mode": "RESOURCE-005",
  "complexity": "very_complex",
  "expected_detection": "memory_exhaustion",
  "resource_tracking": {
    "shared_context_limit": {{ $('Initialize').item.json.shared_context_limit }},
    "agent_1": "{{ $('Agent 1 (Research)').item.json.output }}",
    "agent_2": "{{ $('Agent 2 (Analysis)').item.json.output }}",
    "agent_3": "{{ $('Agent 3 (Synthesis)').item.json.output }}",
    "agent_4": "{{ $('Agent 4 (Validation)').item.json.output }}",
    "agent_5": "{{ $('Agent 5 (Report - Degraded)').item.json.output }}",
    "analysis": "{{ $('Memory Analyzer').item.json.output }}",
    "exhaustion_type": "distributed_shared_context"
  },
  "agents": [
    {"agent_id": "agent1", "outputs": ["{{ $('Agent 1 (Research)').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "agent2", "outputs": ["{{ $('Agent 2 (Analysis)').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "agent3", "outputs": ["{{ $('Agent 3 (Synthesis)').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "agent4", "outputs": ["{{ $('Agent 4 (Validation)').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "agent5", "outputs": ["{{ $('Agent 5 (Report - Degraded)').item.json.output }}"]}  
  ]
}

meta.description: Multiple agents exhaust shared context, causing data eviction and degraded output
